### Post by dremeda on 2007-04-21
Well I upgraded to Feisty today :) but Beryl wont work. No errors, Beryl Manager says it is working but no effects, anyone got an idea?


### Post by francesco_m on 2007-04-21
try to add/modify these lines.

Section "Screen"
...
    Option         "TripleBuffer" "true"
    Option         "NoLogo"
    Option         "RenderAccel" "True"
    Option         "AllowGLXWithComposite" "True"
...

Section "Extensions"
    Option         "Composite" "Enable"
...

:)
Francesco

---
